review_title: A Complete SEO Dashboard That Finally Makes Sense
description: As the owner of a small print-on-demand company in Berlin (nur.Berlin – Hauptstadtshirts), I was looking for an SEO tool that delivers real insights without wasting time. SEOcrawl combines Google Search Console and Analytics data in a way that’s both faster and clearer — just like I heard on the Search Effect podcast, where someone called it “Analytics on Speed.” What really makes a difference is the Change Tracking feature. It automatically compares your rankings 7, 30, and 60 days after each documented update. For a small team like ours, that’s incredibly valuable — we can finally measure which optimizations truly worked over time. SEOcrawl helps us focus on what matters, save time, and make SEO decisions based on actual data instead of gut feeling.
author: Asmus K.
pros: • Smart change tracking and historical comparisons • Clear dashboards, easy to use • Excellent for small teams that need efficiency
cons: • Loading can take a moment with very large datasets • A few German translations could be smoother, but usability is great and intuitive
author_profession: Founder and SEO Manager at nur.Berlin – Hauptstadtshirts

review_title: THE SEO tool that understand what SEO specialist needs!
description: I have my doubts at first, there are many tools out there claiming to challenge Semrush and Ahrefs But after a few months of using it, I think they might be able to do it! They offer features that we SEO really need! GA removed annotation? They are offering it, and they are going it better. This tool also comes with Kanban-style project management system which you can: create, assign & work on tickets, and when you are done? They have options to directly add it as an annotation! Why is it important? So you can show your clients that after we work on these tasks, we improve this much!! sweet huh?
author: Chin Keong W.
pros: Annotation features: you can add annotation after implementing a task, and it will show you the results after the implementation. (you can even schedule them to send you an email after 7 or 30 days after implementing it) Keyword research tools: I dare say the keyword research tools is even better than the big boys out there, allows more indepth filter even though you don't understand Regex!
cons: Data is lagging behind Search Console and only focuses on SEO
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My experience is when you are writing it would guide you to change the way you write your sentences for better SEO, so that Google could rank your site better than other people that did not use "SEOSCRAW" when writing their scrip on their website.

pros: I am still new in this area so therefore I could not say too much about it. All I know is that there is a Google Scrawl may be once or twice a month. Therefore it is very important to implement a good "SEO" words that Google would recognize to rank your web page better. So SEO helps the writer to choose better words or adjectives or nouns when writing your scripts,.
cons: As I said, I am still learning, I could not say much about it.

review_title: Very Usefull Tool
description: I use SEOcrawl mainly to get a quick and reliable view of organic performance and optimization opportunities without having to jump between multiple tools and spreadsheets. The platform is very intuitive: it doesn’t take long to start navigating the reports, understand what’s going on, and prioritize next steps. The highlight, without a doubt, is the dashboards. They are very well built, easy to interpret, and genuinely useful in day-to-day work — both for internal analysis and for presenting results. On top of that, the integration with Google Analytics and Google Search Console works brilliantly: the data is well connected inside the tool and makes it much easier to link performance (traffic, engagement/conversions) with visibility and queries/pages, which saves a lot of manual work.
author: Victor B.
pros: - Very intuitive and easy-to-use tool - Excellent dashboards, clear and ready for decision-making - Very solid integration with Google Analytics and Google Search Console - Built-in task management feature that helps turn insights into actions and track execution - Saves time when reading data and monitoring organic performance
cons: - I would like to have more customization options in some reports, especially when it comes to exploring and segmenting Google Analytics (GA) data

review_title: World-Class Support and Intuitive SEO Dashboards
description: My experience has been 5-star. Moving from other legacy SEO tools to SEOcrawl has been a breath of fresh air. The data management and report generation are top-tier, and the fact that the leadership team is hands-on with their customers gives me great confidence in the product's future.
author: Sally-May S.
pros: The customer support is absolutely exceptional and truly sets this company apart. I needed to migrate a Lifetime Deal account to a new email address, and the CEO himself personally ensured it was handled flawlessly in under 24 hours. Beyond the service, the interface is incredibly intuitive and much cleaner than other legacy SEO tools. It transforms complex Google Search Console data into actionable insights that are easy to monitor. The reporting features and keyword tracking save me hours of manual work every single week.
cons: I haven't found any major downsides yet. As with any powerful data tool, there is a small learning curve to see all the reporting possibilities, but the team's responsiveness makes any transition very smooth.

review_title: A gem for SEO pros and teams - SEO monitoring & reporting with 100% accurate GSC data WITHOUT Googles 16 month data limit
description: For SEO professionals, agency teams, enterprises and even small businesses it offers a good return on investment. I can only say, everyone is looking to work more effectively and improve their daily routine, and this SEO tool can save a lot. For monitoring and reporting I spend less time in other tools like Ahrefs, Semrush...
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I like most about this tool is that it saves you and your team so much time in daily SEO tasks, monitoring and reporting results to your team and clients. It provides crucial SEO insights and a comprehensive overview of your projects, offering a big-picture view as well as a drilled-down analysis on individual pages, keywords, or rankings. It uses 100% ACCURATE real live data from GOOGLE SEARCH CONSOLE and GA4, making it a little gem. Best: Without the 16 month limitation so you can easily compare 2 years and track SEO on the long run. It's perfect for all SEO professionals, small teams and enterprises, and even beginners because it's incredibly user-friendly. The standout features are its visualizations and dashboards that uniquely format complete Google Search Console live data. Plus, it integrates with really user-friendly email reporting and an annotation feature, making it easy to track on-page and off-page strategy changes. You can tell it's crafted by seasoned SEO pros. I don't use other tools like Ahrefs or Semrush as much anymore, as they can't do what this little tool from Spain can. It's fantastic, backed by the expert team that made Chess.com the global leader in its field. Give it a try, whether you're a team or an individual, if you want quick insights for optimization.
cons: Sure, everyone would prefer not to pay for any tool LOL :P. But try it out, the price is worth it. It's not free, of course, but if you want to advance in SEO and understand your SEO metrics with real live data, you'll have to swallow a price pill. It's for monitoring and reporting, and it does that better than most others. The tool can't handle keyword research; you need other tools for that, only with Google data. But here, you can see all your rankings, clicks, keywords, opportunities, and so on.

review_title: An absolute game-changer for SEO analysis and strategy
description: SEOcrawl provides me with an abundance of insights, which significantly streamlines my time spent on analysis and planning the SEO strategy for the coming months. An additional and substantial benefit is that it enables me to give my clients a clear and comprehensible overview of the work I perform and the long-term results it yields. It’s an invaluable tool for transparency and effective communication with clients.
author: Sebastiaan L.
pros: An absolute game-changer for SEO analysis and strategy – this tool is a non-negotiable essential in my professional toolkit. Don't miss out! Over the past few months, I have been using SEOcrawl more and more intensively. Now, I can confidently say it has become one of my favorite SEO tools. The visual presentation of data it provides is incredibly insightful, offering clarity that is instrumental in shaping an effective SEO strategy. A genuine must-have for anyone serious about SEO!
cons: Initially, I was skeptical. The market is flooded with tools that claim to rival giants like Semrush, MOZ, and Ahrefs. However, after using this product for several months, I am genuinely impressed. SEOcrawl has carved out a unique position for itself by brilliantly visualizing GCS and GA data in an engaging and intuitive manner, making it comprehensible for both professionals and clients alike in reports. Bold as it may sound, I firmly believe that even Google could take a page out of the SEOcrawl team's book. It’s that remarkable.

review_title: Simple and Powerful Underrated SEO tool
description: If you’re the kind of person who likes to get into the nitty-gritty of SEO and enjoys seeing the cogs turn, SEOCrawl is your tool. Just keep in mind you might want to buddy it up with something else for content planning. It’s helped me and my clients make some solid gains in our online presence.
author: Ankit J.
pros: What I love about SEOCrawl is how it just gets straight to the point. It’s like having a cheat sheet for SEO that’s actually easy to understand. For someone who’s been messing around with code and websites since I was a teenager, it’s nice to see a tool that doesn’t beat around the bush and helps you tackle technical SEO head-on. It’s become a go-to for me and my clients when we need to get under the hood of a website and really tune it up for better rankings.
cons: I’ve noticed that SEOCrawl could beef up their content strategy features a bit. It's ace for the tech stuff, but when it comes to planning and optimizing content, it feels like it’s not quite there yet. A little more oomph in that department would make it an all-around MVP.

review_title: Well designed & user-friendly SEO tool with tons of features
description: I use the tool on a daily basis and like all the features and opportunities it gives to improve the SEO performance and teamwork with the task management system.
author: Ognian M.
pros: I like all the different features and integrations SEOcrawl offers. For example, the rank tracker with the option to check keywords, pages, countries, tags, and more. There are also other handy reports such as new & lost keywords, cannibalization, questions, and opportunities. I love the graphics and use them on a regular basis for weekly/monthly reports for different clients. They give a nice, quick overview of the main metrics and improvements. The annotation feature is really useful as well and helps automate the process of finding whether an improvement we did was successful. Instead of manually checking a specific page or set of pages, we get notified with a nice summary on a weekly basis. The project-management system (tasks feature) is also powerful and helps to organize and manage tasks, team members, and everything else important in order to bring outstanding results thanks to the teamwork of everyone involved in a project. Last but not least, the team is amazing at listening to our needs and requests. Whenever we need a new feature added or improved, they do their best to react asap and bring it to the table.
cons: I can't think of any major cons as of this moment.

review_title: Love the product and the team
description: Absolutely love this app.
author: Sunny P.
pros: I have been using SEOCrawl for a few months now and love it for my daily monitoring of several websites. It gives you a birdseye view which you can then zoom into for a wealth of data.
cons: The website is Spanish native, I'd like it to be English native. With then the option of language selection.

review_title: Must have SEO-Tool
description: Top Kundenservice und eine unverzichtbare Software für SEO.
author: Salih Ö.
pros: Ich kann unbegrenzt viele Keywords verfolgen und sehe meine Rankings in Echtzeit. Wenn die Rankings runtergehen, weiß ich sofort woran es liegt und kann gegensteuern.
cons: Super übersichtlich und super einfach zu bedienen.

review_title: Gran herramienta de tracking y mejora SEO
description: Satisfactoria, aunque la herramienta aún necesitas mejoras. Es cuestión de tiempo.
author: Óscar C.
pros: La creación automática de dashboards desde el inicio, y las posibilidades de tracking y detección de debilidades/oportunidades SEO.
cons: Carece del área de tracking y monitorización de link building, aunque creo que están trabajando en ello.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ein unverzichtbares SEO-Tool für Profis
description: Marktingleiter und Dozent für E-Commerce & SEO
author: Chris W.
pros: SEOcrawl hat unsere SEO-Strategie revolutioniert. Mit einer benutzerfreundlichen Oberfläche und leistungsstarken Funktionen bietet das Tool alles, was man braucht, um SEO-Projekte effektiv zu verwalten und Ergebnisse zu analysieren. Besonders beeindruckend finde ich die Fähigkeit, umfangreiche Daten klar und verständlich darzustellen. Das spart nicht nur Zeit, sondern ermöglicht es, schnell fundierte Entscheidungen zu treffen. Die Integration mit Google Search Console und die automatisierten Berichte sind einfach fantastisch – sie geben einen schnellen Überblick über wichtige Metriken und liefern wertvolle Einblicke. Zudem ist der Kundensupport exzellent und reagiert immer schnell und kompetent auf Anfragen. Insgesamt ein absolutes Must-Have für jedes SEO-Team oder Marketing-Abteilung, die ihre Rankings und Online-Präsenz verbessern möchten. Ich kann SEOcrawl nur wärmstens empfehlen!
cons: Die Funktion eigene Keywörter einzugeben und das Suchvolumen zu erkennen.

review_title: Best SEO tool for seeing what works and what doesn’t
description: There is nothing else out there that brings the value that SEOcrawl has. It’s a near perfect tool for our agency.
author: Nicholas C.
pros: It’s adorable and provides endless value and insight into SEO, including suggestive pages with potential to optimize.
cons: The interface can be a little slow at times.

review_title: Very nice SEO tool for seeing all the data!
description: I bought SEOCrawl for my parenting blog, which has grown rapidly. I wanted clear instructions on what to optimize next and an overview of the visibility of my projects. I'm confident that the SEO tool will receive updates according to user feedback and have complete trust in the support and further development. I highly recommend it.
author: Sarah D.
pros: Easy to use (for SEOs and marketing on different levels) Collects data from GSC and Analytics - nice overview Dashboard is easy to understand I get all the information I need for optimization The support is outstanding (and fast!) Comparison: Google updates and visibility of my projects (nice!) Own annotations: My changes and the visibility after them are tracked! Customization like tagging content / folders or brand keywords Opportunities say what to do next ...
cons: Opportunities are currently (5/24) a little overwhelming (but support said, they're working on it)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: La mejor herramientas para análisis SEO
description: Muy satisfecho y feliz de haber comprado la licencia Lifetime. Una de mis mejores inversiones a largo plazo.Además, el soporte con [sensitive content hidden] a la cabeza es de 10. Siempre responden de manera amable y buscan soluciones rápidas.
author: William M.
pros: La posibilidad de que a partir de un solo vistazo puedo saber el estado del SEO de mis proyectos.
cons: Las funcionalidades con GA4 aún son muy limitadas. Me imagino que es porque la implementación es muy reciente.

review_title: Great Tool For SEOs & Marketers
description: Got this tool as part of an AppSumo deal and am really happy with the purchase. The tool has a number of very useful features that allow you to quickly identify low-hanging fruit and potential cannibalization issues based on your GSC data - something that can take up quite a lot of time to do manually. The rank tracking based on GSC data is a useful supplementation to regular SERP/rank tracking tools. It's less precise, but if you understand where the data is coming from and how Google collects it, it can offer interesting insights into your site's performance. It also makes filtering through your GSC data a whole lot easier and offers interesting insights. Saves a tonne of time when compared to doing it manually or building out your own micro tools/visualizations. The only downside would be the clicks/month limits are kind of low for the monthly/yearly plans currently (current pricing in euros: 9p/m for 10K clicks per month, 29p/m for up to 100K clicks, 49p/m for up to 1M clicks). Agencies or freelancers like myself would hit these limits pretty quickly considering we work on many different sites. I'd still say the tool is worth the money at these prices, but if I was paying monthly/yearly for the tool, I'd like to see these limits increased to, say, 100K/500k/2M and/or the prices of the business/elite plans be reduced slightly. An unlimited package would be an interesting addition too. Overall - Nifty tool that saves multiple hours per week/month on data analysis, provides helpful insights and generates useful reports. Recommended for other marketing freelancers, agencies and marketing teams. Very happy with my purchase.
author: Bram V.
pros: Saves a lot of time and allows you to effectively leverage your site's search data from GSC. You can quickly scan for potential cannibalization issues and low-hanging fruit, saving you from having to sift through all the data manually in GSC or having to create your own reports and/or visualizations. Software is actively being worked on, with new features being added since I started using it. Got a great deal on AppSumo and the customer service is good - notified them of a bug in a new feature and got a response within a few days telling me the issue was fixed.
cons: There's not much I don't like about the tool when considering I got the tool in an AppSumo deal. Looking at their pricing for users that sign up on their website directly, I'd say it's priced on the reasonable/high end. Would be good to see them bump up the clicks/month limits on the plans a little. Overall though, if you do a lot of audits and analysis for clients, it definitely saves enough time to be worth the investment.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Una herramienta útil, fácil y en constante evolución.
description: Me facilita el tracking de palabras clave, el análisis general de oportunidades o ganancias rápidas, el análisis de canibalizaciones.
author: Mariola M.
pros: La evolución constante, la facilidad de uso, la posibilidad de hacer seguimiento de las palabras clave y sus posiciones y los informes.
cons: Los informes deberían ser más configurables y con una mejor presentación (páginas bien maquetadas) y no un simple pantallazo. Así como poder añadir en los informes los bloques que consideremos oportunos, parecido al dashboard, pero con una presentación bien organizada, en páginas.

review_title: Una de mis herramientas SEO favoritas
author: Juan Carlos P.
pros: Es extremadamente fácil buscar insigths en la herramienta y crear informes para mis clientes de forma mucho más atractiva
cons: A veces va un poco lenta y esto dificulta la fluidez en los procesos de trabajo.

review_title: All keywords at a glance
author: Nicky R.
pros: The best thing is that all KEywords and URls are displayed in clear diagrams. A Google Search Console with power features and even more detailed
cons: Responsiveness would need to be improved. There are display problems on smaller screens

description: I love follow my SEO clients with SEOCrawl. I use everyday the Annotation and Tasks systems. Super nice to be able to follow the changes.
author: Jean S.
pros: Ease of use and multiple filters. Also love the reactivity of support team. Really appreciated.
cons: Really... nothing. Maybe some features overlap, but not important.

review_title: Amazing SEO Software
description: Absolutely fantastic. The developer is easy to contact and always comes back to you very quickly.

pros: The way it translates Google Search & Analytical data into an easy to read visual breakdown.
cons: None. Everything what SEO Crawl offers is hard to find on other platforms. Its a great piece of everyday SEO software.

review_title: I'm surprised how much SEOCrawl helps me with my work
description: I use SEOCrawl every day to analyze, design and validate SEO strategies.
author: Lucas F.
pros: I like the detailed dashboards to be able to make more accurate analyzes to draw up SEO strategies.
cons: Nothing so far. But the Crawler could be more detailed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great complement to our productivity stack allowing to digest large amounts of SEO data
description: The support from the SEOcrawl team has been very good. It is evident they take pride in their product and have every intention to ensure the the longevity of this product by adding to the already comprehensive variety of modules allowing for monitoring SEO and ways to improve it.
author: Ben B.
pros: We have multiple URLs so this is a great resource to toggle in between domains. The different reporting and tools allows for an easy way to quickly absorb the SEO health of the sites, get ideas of areas that need improvement, along with offering suggestions of how to improve. The weekly updates offer a great way to get a quick overview on key metrics to keep a pulse on the SEO of our sites without being overwhelmed with too much data.
cons: I haven't seen any features at this point that I dislike. The support from the SEOcrawl team has been great so no complaints there, but since there are quite a few features offered, it would be nice if there were multiple tutorials in a shortened format of how to better use each module allowing for a quick reference to lessen the learning curve and also better utilize the tool to more quickly optimize our SEO
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Data-Driven SEO with Accurate Keyword Insights (and Amazing Support!)
author: Marc F.
pros: Frustrated with manually digging through Google Search Console (GSC) data? SEOCrawl offers a game-changing solution. Its seamless integration eliminates the need for those time-consuming exports and clunky interfaces. This means you can analyze real data, straight from Google, with none of the frustration. SEOCrawl prioritizes accuracy, providing real impressions instead of estimates, which makes a world of difference for keyword research and uncovering true SEO opportunities.
cons: I have nothing negative to say about SEOCrawl. It's been a lifesaver!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
